strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure
Demonstrated AI-agent infrastructure work and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Proven entrepreneurial initiative with open-source GIS platform used by real-world NGOs
concerns: No explicit evidence of cloud AI platform strategy leadership or customer advisory experience
Lack of documented AI/ML product delivery (e.g., trained models, ML pipelines, or production AI systems)
No advanced degree in AI-related field; only BS in Computer Science listed
response.justification: The candidate has 15+ years of engineering experience with direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and code generators, fulfilling the core technical requirement; however, there is no evidence of strategic cloud product roadmapping, customer advisory, or AI platform design at scale — critical for the director-level IC role. While entrepreneurial and open-source contributions are strong, the absence of an advanced AI degree and documented AI product delivery reduces alignment with preferred qualifications.
